theorem procedural_RingEquiv_piCongrRight_trans_fcce2b02ccc6 : (True →
    (∀ {ι : Type _} {R : ι → Type _} {S : ι → Type _} {T : ι → Type _} [(i : ι) → NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring (R i)]
      [(i : ι) → NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring (S i)] [(i : ι) → NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring (T i)]
      (e : (i : ι) → R i ≃+* S i) (f : (i : ι) → S i ≃+* T i),
      (RingEquiv.piCongrRight e).trans (RingEquiv.piCongrRight f) =
        RingEquiv.piCongrRight fun i => (e i).trans (f i))) ∧
  (∀ {I : Type _} {f : I → Type _} {γ : Type _} [Nonempty I] [(i : I) → NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring (f i)]
    [NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring γ] (g : (i : I) → γ →ₙ+* f i) (hg : ∀ (i : I), Function.Injective ⇑(g i)),
    Function.Injective ⇑(Pi.nonUnitalRingHom g)) := by
  sorry
